en: tanivu, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
tanivu, are you home?

ab: o’a mo’so yonta emoo ’o tanivu! ’a yangui a’o, pano nteko? ta’u evaha to tanivu ho tac’u yuovei.
ch: B:tanivu不在家耶!我是yangui，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告tanivu。
en: tanivu is not at home. I am yangui. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: ba’i, ’a yangui ho tanivu a’mi, maavo n’a ta phingi!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是yangui和tanivu，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are yangui and tanivu, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: ’a pasuya a’o, te’o biebimi to mo’o.
en: I am pasuya, I am here for mo’o.

ab: ba’i, mi’o esmi ho aopa’to suu.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: mikocu noana’o o’te uhtan’e, engha na’na talʉa na suu.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: tanivu, mi’o biebimi suu ho mici peispak’i.
en: tanivu, I am here to play with you.

ab: aupcio yʉmeʉmʉ, os’o ’aoka totea na suu.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: ’e os’o iachia emʉ’a ci f’ue, oothma.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看。
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: uh tan’e, oothma ’e os’o iachia emʉ’a ci beahci no ana.
ch: A:過來，這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: yusuhngu! oothma ’e os’o emʉ’a ci pohe.
ch: A:請坐！這是我種的有機玉米吃看看。
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: o’a la’u ʉmnʉa ’o huv’o , te’o bonʉ to heesi.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: te’o s’eapucusi ’e te’o p’aeni ci beahci.
ch: A:我給你吃的水果我要削皮。
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.
Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: te’o mayo to chumu no teko ima.
en: I will bring you some water.
Thank you.
Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.
Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.
I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
